'''Stacy''' was an [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] [[Rebel pilot/Legends|pilot]] serving the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] under [[General/Legends|General]] [[Carlist Rieekan/Legends|Carlist Rieekan]] around the time of the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. Shortly after the battle, [[Gender/Legends|she]] was attracted to and flirted with [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], who returned her attention, mostly to antagonize [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]].

==Behind the scenes==
The appearance of Stacy in the novel [[Allegiance (novel)|''Allegiance'']] was an homage to the protagonist of the ''[[Pink Five]]'' [[fan film]]s, who harbors an infatuation with Han Solo and exhibits antagonism towards Leia.<ref name="Pink Five">{{WebCite|url=http://www.pinkfive.com|text=The Pink Five Saga|archivedate=20250321005356}}</ref>

The first film, which was directed by Trey Stokes and featured Amy Earhart as Stacy.<ref name="Pink Five Site">{{WebCite|url=http://www.pinkfive.com/p5_credits.html|text=Cast and Crew|work=Return of Pink Five|archivedate=20190410013026}}</ref> Author [[Timothy Zahn]], a fan of ''Pink Five'',<ref name="Pink Five Production Blog">"{{Blogspot|subdomain=rop5|url=2007/01/geekza-3-canon-1.html|name=The Pink Five Production Blog|text=Geekza 3, Canon +1}}</ref> included Stacy in ''Allegiance'' as "a little nod to all the fan films in general, but focused on ''Pink Five''."<ref name="SWI104">{{InsiderCite|104|Star Tours: Taking Off on a Star Tour|''Star Tours'': Taking Off on a Star Tour}}</ref>

In the novel, Zahn spelled Stacy's name differently from what Stokes had intended ("Stacey"); however, Stokes noted that "it's never actually spelled in the films, not even in the credits, so it's not like there was any reference for Tim to work from."<ref name="StacyTalkpage">"[[Talk:Stacy#Spelling|Talk:Stacy]]" on [[Wookieepedia]]</ref>
